description: Viral content hooks, post frameworks, and topics for LinkedIn content generation

post_frameworks.name: Origin Story
post_frameworks.description: Share your beginning, the challenges you faced, and how you got to where you are
post_frameworks.example_hook: I came to {place} against my will in {year}...

post_frameworks.description: Contrast what you used to believe vs what you believe now
post_frameworks.example_hook: 5 years ago, I defined {topic} as...

post_frameworks.description: Share a pivotal career moment that taught you something valuable

post_frameworks.description: Take a trending topic and add your unique perspective

post_frameworks.description: Share proven wisdom with your personal spin

post_frameworks.name: Numbers Don't Lie
post_frameworks.description: Use contrasting numbers to make a powerful point

post_frameworks.description: Create a fictional but relatable dialogue
post_frameworks.example_hook: Company: 'We're going back to the office.' Employee: '...'

post_frameworks.description: Celebrate your target audience while sharing value
post_frameworks.example_hook: When I met the recruiter that helped me land...

post_frameworks.description: Share a client success story
post_frameworks.example_hook: She went from $0 to $500K in government contracts in 18 months...

post_frameworks.description: Celebrate someone else's achievement
post_frameworks.example_hook: My little sister bought her first car this week...
